allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next, 'eslint:', p.devDependencies.eslint\)")
Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('Agenda_4-2026.pdf'\); [print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---\\n', p.extract_text\(\)\) for i, p in enumerate\(pdf.pages\)]; pdf.close\(\)")
Bash(python -c "from pypdf import PdfReader; r = PdfReader\('Agenda_4-2026.pdf'\); [print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---\\n', p.extract_text\(\)\) for i, p in enumerate\(r.pages\)]")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/brazil-states.geojson'\); console.log\('Features:', d.features.length\); console.log\('Props of first:', JSON.stringify\(d.features[0].properties\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./public/brazil-states.geojson','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Features:', d.features.length\); console.log\('Props:', JSON.stringify\(d.features[0].properties\)\)")
